title: Lokhande Prashant Sitaram appointed as new CBSE Chairperson: Who is he?
content:
Lokhande Prashant Sitaram has been appointed as the new Chairperson of CBSE.
*   He will now lead the Central Board of Secondary Education.
*   The news report aims to provide details about his background and qualifications, addressing the question of "who he is."

title: Five new judges appointed to Supreme Court: Here's a look at each of their careers
content:
Five new judges have been appointed to the Supreme Court.
*   These appointments add new members to the nation's highest judicial body.
*   The accompanying report provides details on each judge's professional career.

title: Oyo-parent Prism secures SEBI's nod to launch ₹6,650-crore IPO
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Prism, the parent company of Oyo, has secured approval from SEBI.
*   This approval allows Prism to launch its Initial Public Offering (IPO).
*   The proposed IPO is valued at ₹6,650 crore.

title: Watch: Air defence battle over Kuwait as Patriot missiles respond to Iranian strike
content:
An air defense battle occurred over Kuwait.
*   Patriot missile systems were deployed to respond to the threat.
*   The engagement was a response to an Iranian strike.

title: Iran inflation hits highest level since World War II. Is another crisis brewing?
content:
Iran's inflation has reached its highest level since World War II.
*   This marks a severe and critical economic challenge for the country.
*   The situation is raising questions about the potential for another looming crisis in the region.

title: Supreme Court forms high-powered expert panel to re-examine Aravalli definition
content:
The Supreme Court has constituted a high-powered expert panel.
*   The panel's primary task is to re-examine the existing definition of the Aravalli range.
*   This initiative addresses the need for a revised or clarified Aravalli definition.

title: The Mountbatten Plan: How June 3 sealed the Partition of India
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Mountbatten Plan was the British proposal that outlined the partition of India into two independent nations.
*   June 3 marks the date when this plan was formally announced and accepted, effectively sealing the decision for India's division.
*   This plan ultimately led to the creation of independent India and Pakistan, formalizing the end of British rule.

title: DRDO, IAF successfully flight-test indigenous RudraM-II air-to-surface missile
content:
DRDO and the IAF successfully conducted a flight test.
*   The test involved the indigenous RudraM-II missile.
*   RudraM-II is an air-to-surface missile.
